title: Velvety Malaysian Rice Pudding
description: A floral, gooey vegan rice pudding with coconut cream and glace cherries, perfect for a lazy Sunday treat.
instructions: Rinse the rice until water runs clear, then soak in a bowl for 30 minutes.
Drain the rice and add it to a saucepan with the water and a pinch of salt, bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer covered for 15 minutes or until the water is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Stir in the coconut milk, soy milk, sugar, vanilla extract, and cardamom; return to a gentle simmer and cook for 10 minutes, stirring frequently until the mixture thickens to a creamy consistency.
Remove from heat, fold in the glace cherries, and transfer the pudding to individual serving bowls or a shallow dish.
Allow the pudding to cool to room temperature, then refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to set the flavors.
Just before serving, sprinkle toasted coconut flakes over the top for a subtle crunch and an extra hint of aroma.
Serve chilled for a refreshing, velvety dessert that feels indulgent yet light.
Enjoy the floral sweetness of the cherries and the gentle richness of coconut in every spoonful.
